title: Zaslawye Heavy Rain
lead: Zaslawye is experiencing a critical weather event with heavy rain. The Z-Score of -3.06 indicates a significant anomaly.
body:
The current weather conditions in Zaslawye are characterized by heavy rain, with an Umidita of 88% and Vento of 16.2 km/h.
The HDD value of 11.7 GG and CDD value of 0.0 GG indicate a significant impact on heating and energy consumption.
The Score of 10.0/10 and Level of CRITICAL suggest a high level of disruption to daily activities.
